resources.string: The service is not available, please try again later.

In order to receive these notifications when the app is running in the background, background location access is needed.\nNo location history is stored, only the latest location is saved.\nDo you want to enable it in the settings?
In order to receive these notifications, push notifications need to be enabled.\nDo you want to enable it in the settings?
In order to scan QR codes, access to the devices camera is needed.

This app collects location data to enable geofencing and to update your location on the platform, even when the app is closed or not in use.\nNo location history is stored, only the latest location is saved.
This app uses your location to show location-based information in the console while you are using the app.

This app collects location data to enable geofencing, even when the app is closed or not in use.\nNo location history is stored, only the latest location is saved.\nTo enable this, allow location access all the time in the next step.
This app sends push notifications to alert you about events and messages from the platform.\nTo receive them, allow notifications in the next step.
This app uses the camera to scan QR codes.\nImages are processed on your device and are not stored or shared.
This app uses Bluetooth to find and connect to nearby devices, so they can be set up and controlled.
This app uses Bluetooth to find and connect to nearby devices, so they can be set up and controlled.\nOn this version of Android, location permission is required to scan for Bluetooth devices.
To save the file to your Downloads folder, allow storage access in the next step.
